stage_description: TODO (Plan 1 placeholder): scientifically-backed description of the senior stage (10+ years; AAHA/AAFP 2021 merges senior and super senior). Text will be replaced in Plan 2.
nutrition: TODO: senior cat food, kidney support, higher protein digestibility.
activity: TODO: gentle regular activity, accessible bedding and litter boxes (low sides), warmth and comfort.
veterinary_check_frequency: TODO: exams every 6 months, expanded blood chemistry, urinalysis, blood pressure monitoring, T4. Source: AAHA/AAFP 2021.
dental_care: TODO: regular dental evaluation — periodontal disease is particularly common at this stage.
warning_signs: TODO: CKD (chronic kidney disease), hyperthyroidism, arthritis, cognitive dysfunction — monitor for changes.
disclaimer: This information is for educational purposes only and does not replace consultation with a veterinarian.
